name: AuRA
description: Automated Resource Allocation - the NSI user provider agent for managing network reservations across the ANA network.

name: Safnari
description: NSI Connection Service aggregator - manages and monitors NSI connections across multiple network domains.

name: DDS
description: Document Distribution Service - discovers and distributes NSI topology documents and network descriptions.

name: DDS Proxy
description: REST API proxy for the DDS - provides a simplified interface to query topologies, STPs, and SDPs.

name: Aggregator Proxy
description: REST proxy for the NSI aggregator - exposes a simplified connection state-machine on top of NSI.

name: Orchestrator
description: Lifecycle management of network topologies, switching services, STPs, SDPs, and multi-domain point-to-point services.
